info.name: Books
info.description:
# Books API Overview

The **Books** API provides endpoints to manage and retrieve information about books and related resources.

## Authentication

Patch Endpoint require Authentication. Refer the Endpoint to learn about requesting API key.

## End Points

GET

POST

PATCH

DEL

Each request in this collection includes:

- A short summary of what the endpoint does.
    
- HTTP method and path.
    
- Parameters (path/query) with types and examples where relevant.
    
- Required headers.
    
- Request body schema or examples (for methods that send a body).
    
- Key response codes and expected behavior.

request.description:
## Description

For reqeusting a API token for Authentication

## Request Body Schema

|Field|Type|Description|

| Client Name | srting | **Required**. Full name of the person placing the order. |  
| Email ID | integer | **Required.** The Email ID of the person placing the order. |

response.name: 409 Conflict

header.value: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH

query.description: Filters the results by limit. The maximum number of books to return in the response. Default is 10.
Filters the results by genre. Supported values: fiction, non-fiction.

request.description:
## Description

Returns a list of all available books in the library catalog

## Response attributes

| Field | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `id` | integer | **Required.** Unique identifier for the book. |
| `name` | string | **Required.** The full title of the book. |
| `type` | string | **Required.** The genre/category (e.g., fiction, non-fiction). |
| `available` | boolean | Indicates if the book is currently in stock. |

response.name: 200 OK

header.value: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH

variable.description: The unique identifier for the book. Example: 2

request.description:
## Description

Returns detailed information for a specific book using its unique ID. This includes the title, author, genre, and current stock availability.

variable.description: The unique identifier for the book. Example: 2

header.value: GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH

request.description:
## Description

This Endpoint is for updating the order. Need a body with the ID of the book to update. Needs the name that needs to be updated.

After updating check the order again with 'Get details of single book' end point

## Example

## Responce

200 OK - Request is understood successfully and results are sent

202 No Content

1 - the order will be updated with new name iven in the body
